Greg.summary: Highly analytical and versatile Professional specializing in enterprise data automation, business intelligence, and QA automation architectures. Proven track record of translating complex datasets into actionable executive insights and building robust software testing frameworks. Expert in star schema design, ETL pipeline development, and custom workflow automation.
Greg.targetRoles: Senior Data Analyst, Principal Data Analyst, Business Intelligence (BI) Engineer, QA Automation Engineer
Greg.coreCompetencies: Advanced SQL, Power BI, DAX, Teradata, Star Schema Architecture, ETL Pipelines, Data Governance, Python, Swift, PowerShell, R, QA Test Automation, CI/CD (Jenkins), Selenium, RESTful APIs, Git.
Greg.experience:
Enabled executive leadership to identify substantial cost-saving opportunities by building weekly analytical reports in Power BI extracted from complex, multi-source raw datasets.

Optimized data retrieval speeds and dashboard performance by redesigning legacy database architectures into high-performing star schemas using Teradata and Advanced SQL.

Reduced manual processing time by 40% by developing custom Swift-based workflow automation tools and internal data tracking APIs for business operations.

Accelerated software deployment cycles by implementing automated regression testing suites using Python and Selenium within an active CI/CD pipeline.

Rachel.summary: Results-driven Technical Project Manager and Agile Delivery Lead with extensive experience managing complex, cross-functional projects within fast-paced environments. Specialized in optimizing supply chain onboarding, orchestrating electronic data interchange (EDI) implementations, and driving continuous process improvement. Expert at aligning stakeholder requirements with engineering execution.

Rachel.coreCompetencies: Agile Framework, Scrum, SDLC, Change Management, Risk Mitigation, Scope Management, Stakeholder Engagement, JIRA, Confluence, Smartsheet, EDI Connections, 3PL Operations, Process Optimization.
Rachel.experience:
Accelerated supply chain onboarding by 15% across a high-volume portfolio of 20 third-party logistics (3PL) customers by successfully managing simultaneous, end-to-end EDI connection implementations.

Mitigated project delivery delays by 25% by establishing a unified JIRA tracking system and cross-functional communication matrix for engineering and client-facing teams.

Achieved 100% of quarterly department-wide operational plan goals by spearheading continuous process improvement initiatives and eliminating workflow bottlenecks.

Increased team velocity by 20% through coaching cross-functional teams on Agile/Scrum ceremonies, boundary management, and risk analysis.
